description: Cycle 20: Paper quality scoring, bulk operations, and improved empty states

userStories.title: Add paper deduplication management page
userStories.description: As a researcher who imports papers from multiple sources, I want to see detected duplicate papers and resolve them so my library stays clean and accurate.
acceptanceCriteria: DedupPage shows detected duplicate groups with paper details side by side
User can mark a keeper and resolve duplicates via keep/skip/merge actions
Run dedup button triggers the existing backend endpoint and refreshes results
Summary stats show total duplicates found and resolved count
Tests: verify DedupPage renders duplicate groups and resolve actions
Tests: verify dedup API integration triggers scan and returns candidates
userStories.notes: Backend: dedup.py already has run, candidates, verify, resolve endpoints. Frontend: dedupApi exists in api.ts. Need: DedupPage with duplicate group cards, keeper selection, resolve mutation. Register route in App.tsx and add nav item to ProjectDetail.tsx. Add mock handlers for all dedup endpoints.

userStories.title: Add audio overviews page for paper dialogues
userStories.description: As a researcher who learns better by listening, I want to browse and play generated audio dialogues for my papers.
acceptanceCriteria: AudioOverviewsPage lists generated audio dialogues grouped by paper
User can generate a new audio overview with tone and focus area selection
AudioPlayer component plays generated dialogues inline
User can delete audio overviews they no longer need
Tests: verify AudioOverviewsPage renders dialogue list and generate action
Tests: verify audio generation mutation and delete work
userStories.notes: Backend: audio_overviews.py already exists with generate/list/delete endpoints. Frontend: audioOverviewsApi exists in api.ts, AudioPlayer and AudioOverviewDialog components already exist. Need: AudioOverviewsPage listing overviews with generate + play + delete. Register route and nav item. Add mock handlers. Reuse existing AudioPlayer component.

userStories.title: Add search page and similar papers discovery
userStories.description: As a researcher exploring my paper collection, I want to search external academic sources and find similar papers within my own library.
acceptanceCriteria: Register existing SearchPage in App.tsx with /search route and nav item
Paper detail or PDF reader shows 'Similar Papers' section with papers from the same project
Similar papers uses the existing paperApi.getRelated endpoint (embeddings-based)
Each similar paper card shows title, authors, year, and similarity score
Tests: verify SearchPage renders and search/import work
Tests: verify similar papers section renders related papers from library
userStories.notes: SearchPage.tsx already exists but is not registered in App.tsx — just needs route + nav item + i18n + mock handler fixes. paperApi.getRelated already calls /projects/{id}/papers/{paperId}/similar. Need: register SearchPage, add SimilarPapersPanel component to PDFReaderLayout or paper detail, wire up getRelated call. Backend endpoint may need implementation if not already present.

userStories.title: Add in-app notifications and subscription alerts
userStories.description: As a researcher tracking emerging papers in my field, I want to receive notifications when my subscriptions find new matching papers.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification bell in TopBar shows unread count and dropdown panel
NotificationsPage lists all notifications with read/unread state
Subscription matches generate notifications with paper preview and action buttons
User can mark all as read and dismiss individual notifications
Tests: verify notification list renders with read/unread states
Tests: verify notification panel dropdown works in TopBar

userStories.title: Add citation style picker and bibliography builder
userStories.description: As a researcher writing a paper, I want to generate formatted citations in different styles and build a bibliography from my selected papers.
acceptanceCriteria: CitationStylePicker component with common styles (APA, MLA, Chicago, IEEE, GB/T 7714)
Copy citation button on paper cards that copies formatted citation to clipboard
BibliographyBuilder dialog to select papers and generate a formatted bibliography
Export bibliography as text, BibTeX, or RIS from the builder
Tests: verify CitationStylePicker renders and style selection works
Tests: verify bibliography builder generates output with selected papers
userStories.notes: Backend: export.py already generates BibTeX/RIS. writingApi.citations exists in api.ts. Need: CitationStylePicker UI component, copy-citation action on paper cards (PapersPage + PDFReader), BibliographyBuilder dialog with paper selection and multi-style output. Reuse existing export_service.py for format generation.

userStories.title: Add notes aggregation across project papers
userStories.description: As a researcher reviewing my paper collection, I want to see all my notes aggregated in one place with search capability so I can quickly review and find insights across papers.
acceptanceCriteria: NotesPage shows summary cards (Total Papers, Papers with Notes, Total Notes)
Search input filters notes across all papers in the project
Note cards display paper metadata (title, authors, year, journal) and reading status
Long notes are truncated with Show more/less toggle
Notes render Markdown formatting including math (LaTeX)
Link to open paper in PDF reader from each note card
Tests: verify NotesPage renders summary cards and note list
Tests: verify search filters notes by content
Tests: verify backend aggregation endpoint returns correct counts and filtered notes
userStories.notes: Backend: papers table has notes (text) and reading_status columns. Need: aggregate endpoint counting total papers, papers with notes, total notes characters, and filtered note entries. Frontend: NotesPage with summary cards, search bar, note cards with Markdown rendering. Register route and nav item. Add MSW mock handler.

userStories.title: Wire up team members page and add reading goals
userStories.description: As a researcher managing a team, I want to see team members on a dedicated page, and set reading goals to track my progress.
acceptanceCriteria: TeamMembersPage shows the TeamMembersManager component
Team nav item appears in project sidebar
Reading goals card shows daily/weekly targets with progress bars
Users can edit reading goals and persist them
Streak counter shows consecutive days meeting goal
Tests: verify team page renders, reading goals CRUD and calculations
userStories.notes: TeamMembersManager existed but was orphaned. Reading goals uses localStorage with useReadingGoals hook. computeTodayProgress counts unique papers by ID per day. computeStreak counts consecutive days meeting daily goal.

userStories.title: Add reading goal progress bars to overview page
userStories.description: As a researcher, I want to see my reading goals progress on the project overview for quick motivation.
acceptanceCriteria: OverviewPage shows reading goals progress card
Displays today's papers read vs daily goal
Shows current week streak
userStories.notes: Reuse ReadingGoalsCard from ReadingHistoryPage. Added readingSessionApi query to OverviewPage. Card shown only when sessions exist.

userStories.title: Add paper quality scoring with star ratings and quality tags
userStories.description: As a researcher, I want to rate papers and tag quality issues so I can prioritize my reading list.
acceptanceCriteria: Paper rows show star ratings (1-5) and quality tags
Clicking stars updates rating via API
Quality tags can be added/removed per paper
Filter by quality tag works in PapersFilterBar
Tests: verify rating mutation, quality tag toggle

userStories.title: Add bulk paper operations (batch tag, batch status change)
userStories.description: As a researcher managing many papers, I want to update tags and reading status for multiple papers at once.
acceptanceCriteria: Select multiple papers shows bulk action toolbar
Can apply tags to all selected papers
Can change reading status for all selected papers
Batch delete works correctly
Tests: verify bulk tag, bulk status, batch delete

userStories.title: Wire batch actions into toolbar when papers selected
userStories.description: When papers are selected, show batch action buttons for tag, status, and delete.
acceptanceCriteria: Selecting papers shows batch action toolbar
Can add tags to all selected papers
Can change reading status for all selected
Batch delete works with confirmation
Tests: verify toolbar appears, tag mutation, status mutation

userStories.title: Add advanced search with multi-field filtering
userStories.description: As a researcher, I want to search papers by author, journal, DOI, and year range.
acceptanceCriteria: Search by author name
Search by journal
Filter by year range
Advanced toggle in search bar
